description: Letter from Shelomo Kohen and Yaʿaqov Portos to Efrayim [...]. Dated: 12 Elul 5566 AM (1806 CE). (Someone wrote the date 1706 CE on the fragment because they read the century digit as a ת, but more likely it is a ק, with the initial הת implied.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
